name: ClientCreditCard
description: Implementation of the 'ClientCreditCard' model. A client credit card.

Address.description: The billing address for the credit card.

CardHolder.description: The name of the card holder.

CardType.description: The type of credit card, for example Visa or MasterCard.

City.description: The city in which the billing address is located.

ExpMonth.description: The month in which the credit card expires.

ExpYear.description: The year in which the credit card expires.

LastFour.description: The last four digits of the credit card number.

PostalCode.description: The postal code where the billing address is located.

State.description: The state that the billing address is located in.
